actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A new leader has been elected on the isles of Skye after Roddie Mackay beat Donald Manford by 18 votes to 13.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Roddie Mackay, 23, a versatile attacking midfielder who played for Preston and Brighton, has been elected leader of the Halifax Town Football Club after beating Donald Manford by 18 votes to 13.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Derby County's 32-year-old midfielder, Reid, has hurt his groin and is now out for 12 weeks.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A boy was threatened and robbed by an older child in Glengonnar Street, Larkhall, at about 20:45 on Sunday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Peter Robinson, the leader of the Labour Party, outlined the party's position during a speech on Monday night.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Belfast bantamweight secured a unanimous decision in Sunday's semi-final with a scorecard of 30-27, 29-28 and 29-28.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: European champion Conlan, 23, has already qualified for the 2016 Rio Olympics.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The 26-year-old made 35 appearances in the top flight for Angers last term, having previously played for Le Havre, Clermont and Olympique de Valence.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: "I hope to play many matches and help the club to the Premier League as soon as possible,"

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Michael Freshwater, 49, was found dead at a flat in Westridge Road, Halifax, just after 16:15 BST on 29 April.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: One Humboldt penguin was found dead in its cage and two others missing, police spokesman Marco Mueller said.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Last month a sea lion was found dead with a smashed skull. In August three pygmy marmosets were stolen.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Security at the zoo has been stepped up.
